name: TEST - Line Total Not Equal to Quantity x Unit Price (CIB)
trigger_condition:
(
  not is_empty(field.item_total_base)
  and not is_empty(field.item_amount_base)
  and not is_empty(field.item_quantity)
  and round(field.item_total_base, 2) != round(field.item_quantity * field.item_amount_base, 2)
)

payload.content: Line Total Net is not equal to Quantity × Unit Price Net.
Line Total Net is not equal to Quantity × Unit Price Net.
